div1.entryFree: Wassail, a drinking-bout, carousing, quaffing: at wakes and --s, LLL V, 2, 318. a w. candle, H4B I, 2, 179 (a large candle lighted up at a feast). his two chamberlains will I with wine and w. so convince, Mcb. I, 7, 64. takes his rouse, keeps w. Hml. I, 4, 9. leave thy lascivious --s, Ant. I, 4, 56 (O. Edd. vassailes, some M. Edd. vassals).
